name: Silver Perch
description: A freshwater species found in the lakes and river systems of the region.

name: Flying Fish
description: Flying fish, known locally as bangsi, can glide for short distances above the water's surface.

name: Spanner Crab
description: A deep-sea crab with unique red spiny claws, harvested for its tender meat.

name: Catfish
description: Farmed extensively in the region, particularly in freshwater ponds, and used in local dishes like adobong hito.

name: Goby
description: Small, colorful fish found in the mudflats and coastal estuaries of the region.

name: Giant Tiger Prawn
description: This large, commercial prawn species is farmed in the mangrove-rich areas of SOCCSKSARGEN.

name: Giant Trevally
description: This powerful game fish is highly prized in the region, particularly around Sarangani Bay.

name: Yellowfin Tuna
description: A flagship species for General Santos, one of the world’s top tuna fishing hubs.

name: Sardine
description: A small oily fish found in large schools, caught in the region’s coastal waters.

name: Mackerel Tuna
description: >A small to medium-sized tuna species found in coastal waters.
